Title: Create a PuntinaMappa object with valid parameters
Test Data: longitudine = 45.46, latitudine = 9.18, qualitaAria = 50, temperatura = 22, statoMeteo = "Sole", umidita = 60.5, vento = 10.2, pressione = 1013, categoria = "Buona"
Test Steps:
1. Call PuntinaMappa(longitudine, latitudine)
2. Set qualitaAria, temperatura, statoMeteo, umidita, vento, pressione, and categoria
3. Verify that all attributes are set correctly
Expected Result: All attributes should be set to the provided values.

Title: Set invalid values for PuntinaMappa attributes
Preconditions: A PuntinaMappa object has been created
Test Data: longitudine = -100, latitudine = 1000, qualitaAria = -1, temperatura = -50, statoMeteo = "InvalidState", umidita = -100.5, vento = -20, pressione = -1000, categoria = "InvalidCategory"
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to set each attribute with invalid values
2. Verify that setting invalid values fails
Expected Result: Setting invalid values should result in an error or no change in the attribute value.

Title: Create a Suggerimento object with valid parameters
Test Data: titolo = "Reduce Indoor Pollution", testo = "Use air purifiers and keep windows closed.", immagine = "air_purifier.jpg", categoria = "Moderata"
Test Steps:
1. Call Suggerimento(titolo, testo, immagine)
2. Set categoria
3. Verify that all attributes are set correctly
Expected Result: All attributes should be set to the provided values.

Title: Set invalid values for Suggerimento attributes
Preconditions: A Suggerimento object has been created
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to set each attribute with invalid values
2. Verify that setting invalid values fails
Expected Result: Setting invalid values should result in an error or no change in the attribute value.

Title: Navigate from initial map to suggestions screen
Test Steps:
1. Open the initial map screen
2. Click on the button to show suggestions
3. Verify that the suggestions screen is displayed
Expected Result: The suggestions screen should be displayed with relevant suggestions based on the current air quality.

Title: Refresh map data
Test Steps:
1. Scroll down to initiate data refresh
2. Verify that the map is refreshed with updated data
Expected Result: The map should be refreshed with the latest data from the server.

Title: User starts the application and retrieves countries
Test Steps:
1. User starts the application
2. AirQualityActivity sends a request to AirVisual API to load countries
3. MainActivity receives the response and processes the data
4. Verify that the list of countries is displayed
Expected Result: The list of countries should be displayed in the application.

Title: User navigates to states and cities
Test Steps:
1. From the list of countries, select a country
2. MainActivity sends a request to AirVisual API to load states
3. AirVisual API responds with the list of states
4. MainActivity sends a request to AirVisual API to load cities
5. AirVisual API responds with the list of cities
6. Verify that the lists of states and cities are displayed
Expected Result: The lists of states and cities should be displayed in the application.

Title: User enables widget and retrieves data
Test Steps:
1. User enables the widget
2. Widget Provider requests data from AirVisual API
3. AirVisual API retrieves the data
4. Widget Provider presents the data to the user
5. Verify that the widget displays the correct data
Expected Result: The widget should display the correct air quality data.

Title: User views map and refreshes data
Test Steps:
1. User opens the map screen
2. Map Activity requests data from AirVisual API
3. AirVisual API retrieves the data
4. Web View displays the updated data
5. Verify that the map is refreshed with the latest data
Expected Result: The map should be refreshed with the latest data from the server.

Title: Retrieve and display tips based on air quality
Test Steps:
1. User selects a location
2. Posizione calls getConsigliPerFAQ(AQI)
3. getConsigliPerFAQ returns relevant tips
4. Verify that the tips are displayed to the user
Expected Result: Relevant tips based on the air quality should be displayed to the user.

Title: Handle invalid AQI value
Test Steps:
1. User selects a location with an invalid AQI value
2. Posizione calls getConsigliPerFAQ(AQI)
3. Verify that an error is handled appropriately
Expected Result: An error should be handled and appropriate feedback should be provided to the user.

Title: No tips available for certain AQI levels
Test Steps:
1. User selects a location with an AQI of 100
2. Posizione calls getConsigliPerFAQ(AQI)
3. Verify that no tips are displayed if none are available
Expected Result: No tips should be displayed if there are no relevant tips for the given AQI level.

2. Posizione calls getConsigliPerFAQ(AQI)
3. getConsigliPerFAQ returns relevant tips for extreme AQI levels
4. Verify that the tips are displayed to the user
Expected Result: Relevant tips for extreme AQI levels should be displayed to the user.
